details: The scheme "Kisan Parivahan Yojana" introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat, aims to support farmers by providing financial aid for purchasing goods vehicles with a capacity of 600kg to 1500kg. This helps in easy and cost-effective transportation of harvested crops.
benefits: Standard of Assistance (For Small, Marginal, Women, SC/ST Farmers)
Medium-sized goods vehicles (capacity of 600kg to 1500 kg)
35% of the total vehicle cost or ₹75,000/-, whichever is lower
25% of the total vehicle cost or ₹50,000/-, whichever is lower
Minimum Time Limit for Reclaiming Benefits:
eligibility: The applicant must be a farmer.
The applicant must belong to the Gujarat state.
The applicant must purchase a medium-sized goods vehicle (600kg to 1500kg capacity) from an

online: The applicant may visit and apply online at I-Khedut Portal:
On the home page, click on ‘Schemes’ and then click on ‘Agricultural Schemes’.
Now select the scheme, click on the ‘Apply’ button and an application page will open.
Click on "Apply New" button and submit a new application.
Click on the "Update Application" button to add corrections to the application.
Once the application is done, confirm it.
Take a print out of the confirmed application.
Applicant can also check their Application Status/View/Print/Upload Application details from the below link:
Application will be accepted on the principle of first come, first serve bases within the target limits.

documents_required: Quotation/proforma invoice from an authorized dealer.

faqs.question: What is the objective of the "Kisan Parivahan Yojana"?
faqs.answer: The objective of the "Kisan Parivahan Yojana" is to provide financial assistance to farmers for purchasing medium-sized goods vehicles.

faqs.question: Who is eligible to apply for the "Kisan Parivahan Yojana"?
faqs.answer: Any farmer residing in the state who owns agricultural land is eligible to apply for the scheme.

faqs.question: What type of vehicle is covered under the scheme?
faqs.answer: The scheme provides financial assistance for purchasing medium-sized goods vehicles with a capacity between 600kg to 1500kg.

faqs.question: How much financial assistance is provided under the scheme?
faqs.answer: Small, Marginal, Women, SC/ST Farmers receive 35% of the total vehicle cost or ₹75,000, whichever is lower. General and Other Farmers receive 25% of the total vehicle cost or ₹50,000, whichever is lower.

faqs.question: Can a farmer apply if they have already availed of the scheme benefits in the past?
faqs.answer: No, a farmer who has already received benefits under the scheme must wait for 5 years before reapplying.

faqs.question: Is the scheme available for farmers from all states in India?
faqs.answer: No, the "Kisan Parivahan Yojana" is only available to farmers residing in Gujarat.

faqs.question: Is it mandatory to purchase the vehicle from an authorized dealer?
faqs.answer: Yes, the farmer must purchase the vehicle from an authorized dealer listed in the government-approved panel.

faqs.question: Where should an applicant submit the application for the scheme?
faqs.answer: The application must be submitted online through the official iKhedut Portal.

faqs.question: Who should an applicant contact for assistance regarding the scheme?
faqs.answer: For any assistance, applicants can visit their nearest agriculture department office or check the helpline details available on the iKhedut portal.

faqs.question: Is there any deadline for applying to the scheme?
faqs.answer: Applications are accepted on a first-come, first-serve basis within the set target limits, so early application is recommended.
